texto: Take it from me, an authority on expertise: You can't trust experts.
explicacao: Citação de Jeff Schmidt sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “Take it from me, an authority on expertise: You can't trust experts.” articula trabalho, career, experts em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como experts.

frase_original: Take it from me, an authority on expertise: You can't trust experts.

texto: When employers designate certain jobs "professional" and insist that employees have professional training – not just the technical skills that seem sufficient to do the work – they must have more in mind than efficiency. Hierarchical organizations need professionals, because through professionals those at the top control the political content of what is produced, and because professionals contribute to the bosses' control of the workforce itself.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jeff Schmidt sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “When employers designate certain jobs "professional" and insist that employees have professional …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, career, experts, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

Hierarchical organizations need professionals, because through professionals those at the top control the political content of what is produced, and because professionals contribute to the bosses' control of the workforce itself.
